response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, extensive experience with developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, code generators), and clear leadership in open-source and workshop initiatives, but lacks explicit evidence of people management beyond informal mentorship and limited mobile platform exposure, which are key for this role.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, code generators)
Proven track record of technical leadership through open-source projects and workshops
Broad technical stack across mobile, web, and systems programming with strong testing focus
concerns: No clear documentation of formal people management experience beyond technical leadership
Limited evidence of mobile platform expertise despite role's focus on mobile ecosystem
No mention of strategic roadmap planning or organizational change leadership
